fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: Mississippi CNA Certification Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your Certification (2026)
seo.description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Mississippi - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: CNA license reciprocity mississippi, how to transfer CNA license to mississippi, mississippi CNA endorsement application

board.name: Mississippi State Dept of Health
board.mailing_address:
Mississippi State Department of Health
Division of Health Facilities Licensure and Certification
P.O. Box 1700
Jackson, MS 39215-1700

license_types.title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a nursing assistant in Mississippi.

steps.title: Meet Eligibility Requirements
steps.description: Ensure you meet Mississippi's eligibility criteria for CNA certification, including age, education, and criminal background requirements, as detailed in the Mississippi Nurse Aide Candidate Handbook.

steps.title: Complete Approved Training Program
steps.description: Successfully complete a state-approved Nurse Aide Training and Competency Evaluation Program (NATCEP) in Mississippi. A list of approved programs may be available through the Mississippi State Department of Health.

steps.title: Review Candidate Handbook
steps.description: Download and thoroughly read the Mississippi Nurse Aide Candidate Handbook from the Prometric Mississippi Nurse Aide Portal for comprehensive instructions on the application, examination, and certification process.

steps.title: Apply for Examination
steps.description: Follow the instructions in the Candidate Handbook to submit your application for the Nurse Aide Competency Evaluation Examination through the Prometric Mississippi Nurse Aide Portal. This typically involves completing required forms and providing documentation of your training.

steps.title: Schedule and Pass Exam
steps.description: Once your application is approved, schedule and pass both the written/oral and the skills portion of the Nurse Aide Competency Evaluation Exam administered by Prometric.

steps.title: Get Listed on Registry
steps.description: Upon successful completion of both parts of the exam, Prometric will notify the Mississippi Nurse Aide Registry, and your name will be added to the registry, granting you CNA certification in Mississippi.

documents.detail: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.
Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

provisional_text: Some states allow CNAs to work under supervision for a limited period while their endorsement application is being processed.
reciprocity_text: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

faqs.question: How much does Mississippi CNA endorsement cost?
faqs.answer: The endorsement application fee is $26. Additional costs may include background check fees.

faqs.question: Is a background check required?
faqs.answer: Yes, a fingerprint-based background check is required in Mississippi.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Mississippi?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Mississippi while waiting?
faqs.answer: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.

reciprocity.notes: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become a CNA in MS.

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA to Mississippi.

hero.title: Become a CNA in Mississippi
hero.dek: To become a Certified Nursing Assistant in Mississippi, candidates must apply for testing and certification through the Prometric Mississippi Nurse Aide Portal.

seo.title: How to Become a CNA in Mississippi

official_links.registration_steps: Go to the Prometric Mississippi Nurse Aide Portal, download and review the Mississippi Nurse Aide Candidate Handbook. Follow the instructions within the handbook to create a Prometric online account (if needed) and submit your application for examination.
